channel.title: GitHub Svelte Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: mermaid-js/mermaid-live-editor
item.description: Edit, preview and share mermaid charts/diagrams. New implementation of the live editor.

item.title: MadeBaruna/paimon-moe
item.description: Your best Genshin Impact companion! Help you plan what to farm with ascension calculator and database. Also track your progress with todo and wish counter.

item.title: IBM/carbon-components-svelte
item.description: Svelte implementation of the Carbon Design System

item.title: Androz2091/discord-data-package-explorer
item.description: 🌀 What's really in your Discord Data package?

item.title: one-aalam/svelte-starter-kit
item.description: Svelte with brilliant bells and useful whistles

item.title: illright/attractions
item.description: A pretty cool UI kit for Svelte

item.title: navneetsharmaui/sveltekit-starter
item.description: Sveltekit starter project created with sveltekit, typescript, tailwindcss, postcss, husky, and storybook. The project has the structure set up for the scaleable web application.

item.title: creativetimofficial/notus-svelte
item.description: Notus Svelte: Free Tailwind CSS UI Kit and Admin

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application
